# Decisions: library-surface

- 2026-07-12T10:25:49.031Z — chose **L1: expose the library as subpath exports on the ONE published package — "@alignlabs/sofar/schema" (envelope type + validateEnvelope + makeEvent + all payload types/validators) and "@alignlabs/sofar/engine" (foldLines/foldLog + InitiativeState + derivations + cursor readEvents/exportEvents/exportNDJSON/importNDJSON + serializeEvent) — mapping the repo's existing core/envelope, @sofar/schema, core/fold, core/cursor boundaries onto two consumer-facing entries** over publishing the @sofar/schema workspace package to npm under its bare name (name-collides with a private workspace package in sofar-cloud; D13 — names are permanent, one stewarded artifact beats a second package), or a single "." main export (couples CLI-oriented and library-oriented consumers; subpaths keep the bin-only root intact) because sofar-cloud needs the engine's OWN fold for state parity (SPEC-v2 Phase 3 hard prerequisite) and D11 wants third parties on the format without CLI scraping; user directive Jul 12 explicitly forbids the second package
- 2026-07-12T10:31:47.623Z — chose **L2: d.ts via tsc emitDeclarationOnly into dist/types (rootDir spans packages/ so engine + schema sources emit side by side) + a deterministic build-step rewrite of emitted '@sofar/schema' specifiers to ./-relative .js paths — the published declaration tree is fully self-contained; consumers need moduleResolution bundler-style (extensionless internal specifiers preserved from source)** over api-extractor/dts-bundle rollup (new devDependency — dependency law), or rewriting engine source imports from '@sofar/schema' to relative paths (touches the CLI compilation unit the task forbids restructuring, and erodes the schema-is-the-only-schema-home boundary marker) because the workspace schema package is private by design (D13) so its name must not appear in published d.ts; a two-line specifier rewrite at build time keeps zero new deps, keeps source boundaries intact, and is testable (grep the tree for the bare name)
- 2026-07-12T10:43:11.470Z — chose **L3: ship the library surface as @alignlabs/sofar 0.7.0 — semver MINOR (new public API surface), lockstep root+schema+engine 0.6.3 → 0.7.0; the 0.6.4 bump staged earlier today was never published or committed and is subsumed** over publishing the staged 0.6.4 first and 0.7.0 after (two releases hours apart with the first adding nothing a consumer can see), or a patch bump for the library surface (it is new API, not a fix) because user directive Jul 12 pinned the library surface to a 0.7.0 minor and made it the publish gate; one release carries Phase 12+13 hardening, team-readiness T1-T3, and the library surface together
